nodes.title: ⚙️ Chunking Headroom
widgets_values:
Chunking is automatically calculated based on video length in seconds and the input resolution.

You can set the headroom based on your available VRAM for optimized chunking.

## Suggestion

| Headroom | VRAM |
|--------:|------------:|
| 1.0 | 24GB |
| 2.0 | 16GB |
| 3.0 | 12GB |
| 4.0 | 8GB |

nodes.title: Usage (basic)
widgets_values:
1. Download and select the models and checkpoints to use
2. Select models and files inside the settings and backend UI
3. Enable at the "Type" switch what Workflow type to use
4. Choose at the "VAE" switch what type of VAE processing to use
5. Select at the "Audio" switch what the audio source should be
6. (optional) Set any "Extra" feature you want to use
7. (optional) Enable any extra post processing you like
### Spacial settings
| Setting | Description |
|--------:|------------:|
| Headroom | Used by chunking. Set a multiplayer for available VRAM. |
| T2V dimensions | If T2V is used this will set the aspect and resolution of T2V output. |

nodes.title: Info
widgets_values:
# 🎬 Generation Modalities

Detailed Explanation [LTX Director](https://github.com/WhatDreamsCost/WhatDreamsCost-ComfyUI) 

## Audio Input Settings
| Setting | Description |
|--------:|------------:|
|🗣️ Model Audio | No external audio file used. The AI generates completely new audio based on your text prompt.|
|🔊 Audio Input | Upload an existing voice or music file to drive the animation (e.g., for lip-sync).|
|🎶 Video Audio | Audio from an input video will be used.|
---
## 🚀 VRAM optimization, long videos, spacial options
- ⚙️ Chunking settings for longer videos, chunks will be automatically calculated based on frame-count/length.
- ⛓️‍💥 Tiled VAE may reduce VRAM usage significantly, but also increases generation times a lot and can introduce artifacts.
- 🎞️ When "2x FPS" is active, the latent upscaling process takes ~2.5x longer.
- 🎞️ "2x Resolution" is **always** active,  it will latent upscale the video to its original image input resolution, otherwise the output would be 0.5 of the image input.

💡 The input image or video only determines the aspect ratio of the output. The final resolution is scaled up or down to the selected megapixel value in the Resize Image node, which can be switched to scale by multiplier (1×) to keep the original resolution.

nodes.title: Model links
widgets_values:
### Model Any LTX 2.3 Model | Mine:
[dasiwa-ltx-23-or-lightspeed-or-safetensors](https://civitai.red/models/2543443/dasiwa-ltx-23-or-lightspeed-or-safetensors) ### Latent Upscalers [ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors?download=true) [ltx-2.3-temporal-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-temporal-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors?download=true) ### VAE [LTX23_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/resolve/main/vae/LTX23_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors?download=true) [LTX23_video_vae_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/resolve/main/vae/LTX23_video_vae_bf16.safetensors?download=true) [taeltx2_3.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/resolve/main/vae/taeltx2_3.safetensors?download=true) ### Dual CLIP (Encoder and Projection) [gemma-3-12b-it-heretic-v2_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/DreamFast/gemma-3-12b-it-heretic-v2/blob/main/comfyui/gemma-3-12b-it-heretic-v2_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors) [ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/resolve/main/text_encoders/ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors?download=true) ### Distilled LoRAs (optional) [ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-1.1_fro90_ceil72_condsafe.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/TenStrip/LTX2.3_Distilled_Lora_1.1_Experiments/blob/main/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-1.1_fro90_ceil72_condsafe.safetensors)
OR
[ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384-1.1.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/blob/main/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors)

### Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 unet/
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-22b-*.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │   └── LTX23_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors
│   │   └── LTX23_video_vae_bf16.safetensors
│   │   └── taeltx2_3.safetensors
│   ├───📂 text_encoders/
│   │   └── gemma_3_12B_it_*.safetensors
│   │   └── ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors 
│   ├───📂 latent_upscale_models/ 
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-temporal-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors
│   ├───📂 loras
│   │   ├── 📂 LTX
│   │   │   └── ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-*.safetensors
```

nodes.title: Changelog
widgets_values:
## Requirements - [ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite](https://github.com/Kosinkadink/ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite) - [rgthree-comfy](https://github.com/rgthree/rgthree-comfy) - [ComfyUI-KJNodes](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-KJNodes) - [ComfyUI-DaSiWa-Nodes](https://github.com/darksidewalker/ComfyUI-DaSiWa-Nodes) - [ffmpeg](https://www.ffmpeg.org/) - [Sage Attention](https://github.com/thu-ml/SageAttention) (optional) - [Upscaler model](https://openmodeldb.info/) (optional) - [LTX LoRAs](https://github.com/Lightricks/LTX-2) (optional) --- ## Features - 🎥 **I2V, FLF2V, T2V, V2V** + Audio - 🤝 **Video resolution matching** - Fully automatic scaling - ⚙️ **Chunking** (Seconds/Frame based) - 🎞️ **LTX Latent Upscaler** (2x native latent) - 🪫 **Low VRAM optimizations** - ✨ **Multiple Resolution Upscalers** - 🔗 **VAE options** - Full VAE or Tiled VAE
- 🔊 **Multiple Audio options** - 🫥 **Watermark** option - 📢 **Soundmark** option - 🧮 **Color transfer** feature - 🔖 **Bookmark-Shortcuts** - with number keys --- ## Latest Changes / Fixes - LTX Director 2.0 - 3-Pass option (optimized) - Fixed FPS wire

nodes.title: Load Latent Upscale Model spatial 2x resolution

widgets_values:
a: Total Frames

b: Width

c: Height

d: VRAM Headroom (use 1.0 for 24GB, 2.0 for 16GB, 3.0 for 12 GB, 4.0 for 8 GB)
